calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Seidel, Esq. (415-765-6259) for Plaintiff/Moving party 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES,L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED.
Richard Paris, Esq. (415-456-0678) for Defendant/opposing party Joseph Khalaf.

The Court announces the Tentative ruling. Defendant failed to pay rent, no TIF as to abandonment, landlord is entitled to damages of 61,000. Both sides ARGUED. Defendant Argues there is a pending cross complaint. Counsel present the Complaint and Cross-Complaint. Defendant argues there is a complete affirmative defense: unclean hands and equitable estoppel for breach of the lease. Defendant argues damages award, new tenants to assume lease. Complaint and Cross Complaint are returned to parties. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES,L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to create a triable issue of material fact with competent admissible evidence. The grnating of this motion for summary judgment does not dismiss the cross complaint. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details)Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
